warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"cbt00","text":"Remember to wear gloves as Acrylamide/Bis  is very toxic. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash all of the hardware - make sure they are clean otherwise it may leak
Assemble the glass plates and spacers and fix them in the plastic mounting devices.
Mount the assembled glassplates on the casting stand and make sure the stand is level
Add the APS to the Separation gel-mix
When the remaining gel-mix in the falcon tube has polymerized, remove the H 2 O from the top of the gel by tilting the whole assembly and using a napkin to remove the excess H 2 O.
Mix by gently inverting a few times
Add the TEMED - Cast the gel immediately after addition of TEMED up to the top.
Insert the comb onto the top of the gel.
creator: Brian K Baltzar
